result.text:
What happens when artists stop trying to control every outcome?

In this new episode of Unlocked podcast, Chris Maestas, the Los Angeles-based artist who goes by @0009ine, talks about working with AI, letting go of authorship, and building a visual language where memory, material, and technology collide.

 🎧 Full episode now live: https://t.co/OVpGWz6cmp

legacy.full_text:
When creating pieces for WSOTF, I put a lot of thought into the imagery I wanted to build to reflect my experience.

For “It Was Not an Exception,” I wanted to show a beautiful bloom embedded within an ugly condition beyond its control. Both truths exist at once. https://t.co/e7dvn5mJLr

result.text:
“Wrong Side of the Fence”  ⛓️🌹⛓️

Opening today, 20 February, 7–9 PM, Lisbon

Presented by  @EternoGallery  , this solo exhibition presents a new body of digital works exploring boundaries, identity, and transformation.

Set Down and Left

tweets.text:
NOW ON VIEW: ⛓️ “Wrong Side of the Fence” ⛓️ by @0009.eth

🗓️ Opening today, 20 February 7-9pm
📍 ETERNO Gallery – Marvila, Lisbon
→ On view until 4 April
🎟️ FREE ENTRY

Join us today for the opening of the first solo exhibition by American artist and designer Chris Maestas at ETERNO Gallery in Lisbon. 

Presenting a new body of digital works, the exhibition explores identity, memory, and belonging through layered compositions built from textile-like surfaces and synthetic textures. Emerging from the artist’s experiences and reflections on division, transition, and constructed belonging, the show reflects on the symbolic nature of borders – social, cultural, and emotional – and the spaces that exist in between.

📸: © Chris Costa

tweets.text:
Join us for the "City Edges" exhibition finissage on 31 January at 5PM at Eterno Gallery.

A special guided tour with curator Delfina Sena, followed by an informal moment with music and drinks.

It will be the last chance to visit the exhibition.

RSVP: https://t.co/xDHxbNIptE

tweets.text:
“City Edges” is on view until 31 January. 

Join us for the exhibition’s finissage at Eterno Gallery on 31 January at 5PM (GMT), featuring a special guided tour with curator @DelfinaSenaJ 

In this final AMA excerpt, artists @stijn_stragier @untitledxyz_ @Kldpxl @BorisChimp504 and curator Pauline Foessel  reflect on material, sustainability, and responsibility in digital and physical art practices.

Full session available here, pinned  post. 

#CityEdges #EternoGallery #DigitalArt

result.text:
“City Edges” is on view until 31 January. 

Join us for the exhibition’s finissage at Eterno Gallery on 31 January at 5PM (GMT), featuring a special guided tour with curator @DelfinaSenaJ 

In this final AMA excerpt, artists @stijn_stragier @untitledxyz_ @Kldpxl @BorisChimp504 and curator Pauline Foessel  reflect on material, sustainability, and responsibility in digital and physical art practices.

Full session available here, pinned  post. 

#CityEdges #EternoGallery #DigitalArt

tweets.text:
City Edges continues on view at Eterno Gallery.

In this conversation, curator @FoesselPauline and the artists (@stijn_stragier @untitledxyz_ @Kldpxl @BorisChimp504) reflect on the starting point of the exhibition and why the contemporary city became its core subject.

From urban memory to digital space, the AMA opens a dialogue on how cities are shaped by technology, architecture and human experience.

 On view until 31 January 2026.

tweets.text:
City Edges continues on view at Eterno Gallery, bringing together Yang Yongliang, @stijn_stragier, @untitledxyz_, @Kldpxl, and @BorisChimp504 to explore how cities shift between the physical and the virtual.

The exhibition reflects on how technology, architecture and human experience reshape the way we inhabit and imagine urban space.

Visit us in Marvila and experience City Edges in person.

On view until 31 January 2026

tweets.text:
CITY EDGES - The exhibition brings together 5 digital artists who explore how cities evolve between the physical and the virtual. Through digital, sculptural, and audiovisual works, they reflect on how technology, architecture, and human experience in today’s urban landscapes.

Featuring Yang Yongliang, @stijn_stragier, @untitledxyz_, @Kldpxl, and @BorisChimp504

ON VIEW UNTIL 31 JAN at Eterno Gallery - Marvila

🚨 VHILS × ETERNO — MYSTERY BOX 🚨

The vault opens next week.

📦 Guaranteed physical artwork
💎 Chance to receive rare original works
💰 Minimum 1.5× value guaranteed
🎲 No previews. No selection. Chance is the art.

Four exclusive City Edges editions — each transforming digital ideas into physical form:

@stijn_stragier  — Solar Prints
Edition of 15 + 5 AP
UV print on portable solar panels

Signed & numbered

@untitledxyz_  — 3D Azulejos
Edition of 15 + 5 AP
3D resin print
7 × 8 × 8 cm | 2025
Card signed & numbered

@Kldpxl — Lenticular Motion
Edition of 15 + 5 AP
Lenticular with 6-frame motion effect
29.7 × 42 cm | 2025
Signed & numbered

@BorisChimp504 
 — Sound & Data
Edition of 15 + 5 AP
Silkscreen on Kingdom White 300 g/m² paper
70 × 50 cm | 2025
Signed & numbered

Join us today on for a live conversation about City Edges with @FoesselPauline (Head Curator, ETERNO) and the artists @stijn_stragier, @untitledxyz_, @Kldpxl, and @BorisChimp504.
We’ll discuss digital art, urban transformation, and the ideas behind the exhibition.

legacy.description: Eterno explores and disseminates a new way of creating, buying and collecting art.

profile_bio.description: Eterno explores and disseminates a new way of creating, buying and collecting art.
